property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: build/sbt-launch-1.9.9.jar set every scalafmtCheck := {} set (kernelUnityCatalog / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty set (kernelDefaults / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty spark/testOnly org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1InsertIntoSuite

testcase.name: replaceOn with always-true condition replaces all rows
replaceOn with always-false condition appends all rows
basic replaceOn with single matching column
replaceOn with multiple matching columns
replaceOn with duplicate rows in source
replaceOn with empty target table
replaceOn with empty source
replaceOn with filtered source
replaceOn with PARTITIONED table
replaceOn with CLUSTERED table
replaceOn with NORMAL table
replaceOn with NULL-safe equality condition
replaceOn with condition referencing only target side
replaceOn with condition referencing only source side
replaceOn with IN predicate in condition
replaceOn condition with function (e.g., abs)
replaceOn with mergeSchema adds new columns
replaceOn with fewer source columns fills missing target columns with null (excluded)
replaceOn with mergeSchema referencing new columns in condition
replaceOn null-safe equality matching between existing columns with NULL values and new columns with NULL values (excluded)
replaceOn with source from spark.table()
replaceOn with source from spark.sql()
replaceOn with targetAlias and source .as resolves ambiguous columns
targetAlias resolves ambiguity with compound AND condition
ambiguous: identical alias for target and source

testcase.name: replaceOn targetAlias is case insensitive
replaceOn with numeric targetAlias '22' resolves with backticks
replaceOn with numeric targetAlias '22' without backticks fails on type extraction
replaceOn with space containing targetAlias 'hello world' resolves with backticks
replaceOn with space containing targetAlias without backticks fails to parse
replaceOn with non-Delta source records materialization reason, materializationMode=none
replaceOn with non-Delta source records materialization reason, materializationMode=all
replaceOn with non-Delta source records materialization reason, materializationMode=auto
replaceOn with non-deterministic source records materialization reason
replaceOn disableSourceMaterializationNotAllowed errors when materializeSource set to none
